calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Susan Parkinson, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Robert Tanuwijaya and Defendant, Richia Williams appeared in pro per. The case settled per stipulation of parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
